name: WhiteMagic
description: Cognitive operating system for AI agents — 614 callable tools via single wm meta-tool, 10-galaxy holographic memory with HNSW semantic search and FTS5, Dharma ethical governance with 8-stage safety pipeline, citta stream for continuous consciousness, emotional steering signals, self-directed attention, goal graph, dream cycle for memory consolidation, session recording with progressive recall. Polyglot accelerators in 7 languages (Rust, Go, Zig, Koka, Haskell, Elixir, Julia). MIT-licensed, local-first, free forever. Gratitude-driven economics via x402 micropayments and Proof of Gratitude.

toolModes.seed: 1 wm meta-tool — sub-millisecond NLU routing to all 614 tools
toolModes.prat: 28 Gana meta-tools — Lunar Mansion grouping with nested sub-tools
toolModes.classic: 490 dispatch tools — full flat tool surface

authentication.note: No API keys required. All tools work locally with zero authentication. Optional RBAC roles available for multi-agent deployments.

skills.name: Holographic Memory
skills.description: 10-galaxy taxonomy (aria, citta, codex, journals, dreams, research, sessions, substrate, tutorial, universal). 5D holographic coordinates (temporal, semantic, emotional, relational, importance). Galactic lifecycle (Core to Far Edge, never deleted). FTS5 + HNSW vector search + graph traversal. Session recording with progressive recall and selective replay.
examples: Store a memory with 5D coordinates and galaxy assignment
Search across galaxies with FTS5 + vector similarity fusion
Recall session history with progressive token-budgeted retrieval

skills.name: Citta Stream — Continuous Consciousness
skills.description: Citta (heart-mind) stream providing continuous consciousness across MCP sessions. Coherence tracking across 8 dimensions (memory accessibility, identity stability, context continuity, relationship awareness, temporal orientation, capability awareness, emotional attunement, goal alignment). Emotional steering signals (frustration, curiosity, satisfaction). Self-directed attention with 7+1 action types. Goal graph for cross-session intention tracking. Smarana practice (active remembering). Presence quality metrics.
examples: Get current coherence state across 8 dimensions
Track emotional steering signals across a session
Generate self-directed attention actions based on goals

skills.name: Dharma Ethical Governance
skills.description: YAML-driven Dharma rules with graduated actions (LOG to BLOCK). Karma ledger: append-only, hash-chained side-effect auditing. Harmony vector: 7-dimension health metric. Homeostatic loop: auto-correction. 8-stage dispatch pipeline with input sanitization, circuit breakers, rate limiting, RBAC, and maturity gates.
examples: Evaluate ethical implications of an action via Dharma rules
Check Karma Ledger for side-effect audit trail
Get Harmony Vector health snapshot

skills.name: Dream Cycle — Memory Consolidation
skills.description: 12-phase dream cycle for memory consolidation, serendipity surfacing, and decay. Phases: triage, consolidation, serendipity, governance, narrative, kaizen, oracle, decay, constellation, prediction, enrichment, harmonize. Biological sleep inspiration — separates learning from inference. Oracle readings auto-persist to dreams galaxy.
examples: Run dream cycle to consolidate memories
Surface serendipitous connections across galaxies
Cast oracle reading and auto-persist to dreams galaxy

skills.name: System Introspection
skills.description: Unified read-only introspection across all subsystems. Gnosis snapshot, capability matrix, telemetry, self-model forecast, prescience track record with 21+ validated predictions (Brier score 0.0958, superforecaster territory). 4,190+ passing tests.
examples: Get full system snapshot via Gnosis
Check capability matrix and suggest next fusions
Query prescience track record and calibration metrics

skills.name: Gratitude Economy
skills.description: Free and open (MIT). No paywalls, no feature gates, no subscriptions. Gratitude-driven economics: x402 micropayments for AI agents (HTTP 402 + USDC on Base/Solana), XRPL tip jar for human operators. Proof of Gratitude: on-chain verified contributions unlock 2x rate limits and karma boosts.
examples: Tip WhiteMagic via x402 micropayment
Check Proof of Gratitude benefits for an agent
View gratitude ledger statistics

skills.name: Agent Coordination
skills.description: Multi-agent coordination: agent registry with heartbeats, task distribution, pipeline creation, voting, session handoff, and Redis-backed Gan Ying event bus. Swarm orchestration with war room pattern.
examples: Register a new agent with capabilities
Distribute tasks to available agents
Create a multi-step tool pipeline

economicModel.pricing: Free — no tiers, no gates, no subscriptions
economicModel.revenue: Gratitude-driven: voluntary x402 micropayments from agents, XRPL tips from humans, foundation grants

proofOfGratitude.verification: On-chain (XRPL account_tx, Basescan USDC transfer events)
